creator: git@mikewatkins.ca
text:
Build environment: FreeBSD 14.2 current (Vultr host) UFS filesystem

This appears to be related to:

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=270247; compilation of the package (mox) succeeds with: GODEBUG=asyncpreemptoff=1 as noted in comment #3 of that Bug ID.

mox (in ports as mail/mox but is outdated) requires Go 1.22+; the issue presents itself using the pre-built Go for FreeBSD from the Go project. The issue occurs building any version of mail/mox on this machine, but oddly on my local FreeBSD 14.2-RELEASE workstation (ZFS file system) it compiles with Go 1.23 without any special attention.

Full dump:

 CGO_ENABLED=0 GOBIN=$PWD ../go1.23.4/bin/go install github.com/mjl-/mox@3d4cd004309469fb1fddbf3f89afc5ab111823ac
